hotel=Orbitz


Example Search result including filters in the query parameters
https://www.orbitz.com/Flights-Search?filters=%5B%7B%22numOfStopFilterValue%22%3A%7B%22stopInfo%22%3A%7B%22numberOfStops%22%3A0%2C%22stopFilterOperation%22%3A%22EQUAL%22%7D%7D%7D%2C%7B%22numOfStopFilterValue%22%3A%7B%22stopInfo%22%3A%7B%22numberOfStops%22%3A1%2C%22stopFilterOperation%22%3A%22EQUAL%22%7D%7D%7D%2C%7B%22preferredCabinFilterValue%22%3A%7B%22cabinCode%22%3A%22COACH%22%7D%7D%2C%7B%22seatChoiceBasedFilterValue%22%3A%7B%22seatChoice%22%3A%22SEAT_CHOICE%22%7D%7D%2C%7B%22carryOnBagBasedFilterValue%22%3A%7B%22carryOnBag%22%3A%22CARRY_ON_BAG%22%7D%7D%5D&leg1=from%3AAlbuquerque%2C%20NM%20%28ABQ-Albuquerque%20Intl.%20Sunport%29%2Cto%3ASan%20Francisco%2C%20CA%2C%20United%20States%20of%20America%20%28SFO-San%20Francisco%20Intl.%29%2Cdeparture%3A6%2F14%2F2026TANYT%2CfromType%3AU%2CtoType%3AA&leg2=from%3ASan%20Francisco%2C%20CA%2C%20United%20States%20of%20America%20%28SFO-San%20Francisco%20Intl.%29%2Cto%3AAlbuquerque%2C%20NM%20%28ABQ-Albuquerque%20Intl.%20Sunport%29%2Cdeparture%3A6%2F18%2F2026TANYT%2CfromType%3AA%2CtoType%3AU&mode=search&options=carrier%3A%2Ccabinclass%3A%2Cmaxhops%3A1%2Cnopenalty%3AN&passengers=adults%3A1%2Cchildren%3A0%2Cinfantinlap%3AN&trip=roundtrip


Recommended departing flights (5 max)
- lets just select all the recommended departing flights (5 max)
![alt text](image-6.png)

The main container
#app-layer-base > div.uitk-view > div:nth-child(4) > div > div > div.uitk-layout-grid-item.uitk-layout-grid-item-has-column-start-by-large.uitk-layout-grid-item-has-column-start-by-medium.uitk-layout-grid-item-has-column-start > main > div.uitk-spacing.uitk-spacing-margin-blockend-four > ul

The List itesm
#AQqDBArjA3Y1LXNvcy04NGQyMjNkNTU1YjU0NWE2YWE2MGM2NGUwNDA4NzhlYy00MTIwLTEtc3QtdjUtc29zLTg0ZDIyM2Q1NTViNTQ1YTZhYTYwYzY0ZTA0MDg3OGVjLTQxNDAtMX44LlMuMX5BUW9FQ0xta0JCSUhDTlFFRUE0WVZ5Z0NXQUp3QUhBQWVnbHVaR05rYVhKbFkzUjZBMkptYzRnQnJleWlYNUFCQVpBQkFhb0JCd29EUVVKUkVBQ3lBUWNLQTFOR1R4QUJ--F6FPZ9QCIBASoFEgMKATF6BUNvYWNogAEAEkMKGAoKMjAyNi0wNi0xNBIDQUJRGgNTRk8wAQoYCgoyMDI2LTA2LTE4EgNTRk8aA0FCUTgBEgcSBUNPQUNIGgIQASACGhYIARISGg46AgABSgEAUgEAqgEBACIA

Click into each recommended departing flights, a popup will appear
-- popup for united. Select economy
-- popup for american. select main cabin
-- popup for southwest. select choice
-- popup for delta. select detla main classic
![alt text](image-7.png)

Modal: #-F61G47IBAIgEBKgUSAwoBMXoFQ29hY2iAAQASQwoYCgoyMDI2LTA2LTE0EgNBQlEaA1NGTzABChgKCjIwMjYtMDYtMTgSA1NGTxoDQUJROAESBxIFQ09BQ0gaAhABIAIaFggBEhIaDjoCAAFKAQBSAQCqAQEAIgA\= > div.uitk-card.uitk-card-roundcorner-all.uitk-card-has-border.uitk-card-has-overflow.uitk-card-selected.uitk-card-has-primary-theme > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(1) > section > div.uitk-sheet-content > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div.uitk-spacing.uitk-spacing-margin-block-three > ul

Modal Cards
#\= > div#-F61G47IBAIgEBKgUSAwoBMXoFQ29hY2iAAQASQwoYCgoyMDI2LTA2LTE0EgNBQlEaA1NGTzABChgKCjIwMjYtMDYtMTgSA1NGTxoDQUJROAESBxIFQ09BQ0gaAhABIAIaFggBEhIaDjoCAAFKAQBSAQCqAQEAIgA\= > div.uitk-card.uitk-card-roundcorner-all.uitk-card-has-border.uitk-card-has-overflow.uitk-card-selected.uitk-card-has-primary-theme > div:nth-child(1) > div > div:nth-child(1) > section > div.uitk-sheet-content > div > div > div:nth-child(2) > div.uitk-spacing.uitk-spacing-margin-block-three > ul > li:nth-child(1) > div

Once you select a card from the modal it will route you to a new page, filters included in the query parameters
https://www.orbitz.com/Flights-Search?-F61G47IBAIgEBKgUSAwoBMXoFQ29hY2iAAQAaFggBEhIaDjoCAAFKAQBSAQCqAQEAIgA%3D&leg1=from%3AAlbuquerque%2C%20NM%20%28ABQ-Albuquerque%20Intl.%20Sunport%29%2Cto%3ASan%20Francisco%2C%20CA%2C%20United%20States%20of%20America%20%28SFO-San%20Francisco%20Intl.%29%2Cdeparture%3A6%2F14%2F2026TANYT%2CfromType%3AU%2CtoType%3AA&leg2=from%3ASan%20Francisco%2C%20CA%2C%20United%20States%20of%20America%20%28SFO-San%20Francisco%20Intl.%29%2Cto%3AAlbuquerque%2C%20NM%20%28ABQ-Albuquerque%20Intl.%20Sunport%29%2Cdeparture%3A6%2F18%2F2026TANYT%2CfromType%3AA%2CtoType%3AU&mode=search&options=carrier%3A%2Ccabinclass%3A%2Cmaxhops%3A1%2Cnopenalty%3AN&pageId=1&passengers=adults%3A1%2Cchildren%3A0%2Cinfantinlap%3AN&trip=roundtrip


- lets just select all the recommended returning flights (5 max)
this is the price we want to use. 
Mark depart/return airlines and all essential details to fill in the data
![alt text](image-8.png)
